description: Daily ARK Invest ETF holdings tracker. Diffs 6 ETFs (ARKK/ARKQ/ARKW/ARKF/ARKG/ARKX) day-over-day to detect NEW POSITIONS / ADDS / TRIMS / CLOSED. Cathie Wood smart-money positioning with same-day visibility (vs 45-day-lagged 13Fs). Emits ark.position_change.

schedule.description: ARK holdings — daily 6 UTC (~1 AM ET, after ARK publishes overnight)
